allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "leadpin|tauri|cargo|node|vite" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:PATH"; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","tauri:dev" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\antigravity_projects\\leadpin" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Output "Started tauri:dev in detached window")
